E.Value: Join the local Trials Cup to prove to your friends that you can ride the bike!
Race against the best local riders to show your talent!
Race against the best riders where the sport was invented!
Meet the best of the old continent and beat them all!
New countries, new Trials pros. Are you ready for a new challenge and a big pay check?
This is it: the Trial Bike World Championships! This is where legends are made!
Tricks, danger and broken bones. No rules, no regret. Show these hotheads what you're really made of!
A trip around the most legendary Trials tracks in the world. Do you have the endurance for the ride - and the jet lag?
Collectable afterburner thruster for the bike. Activates when picked up, lasts for 2 seconds.
Allows player to continue from this point after a fault.
Target hunt game mode breakable score item.
Sets player on fire. Small area.
Sets player on fire. Small area.
Sets player on fire. Medium area.
Sets player on fire. Medium area.
Sets player on fire. Large area.
Ring of Fire game mode score item. Gives player afterburner.
Giant Ball game mode tracks must have this object. Game ends when bike falls off it.
Giant Ball Inside game mode tracks must have this object.
Super heavy explosive. Explodes when hit!
Modifies camera view angle during gameplay when the bike is nearby
Modifies camera view angle during replays when the bike is nearby
Set track preview image using this camera object
Can be glued between two physical objects to limit their relative movement
Can be glued between two physical objects to limit their relative movement
Can be glued between two physical objects to limit their relative movement
Can be glued between two physical objects to limit their relative movement
Can be glued between two physical objects to limit their relative movement
Can be glued between two physical objects to limit their relative movement
Can be glued between two physical objects to limit their relative movement
Can be glued to physical objects to make them rotate.
Can be glued to physical objects to make them move.
Ring of Fire game mode starting trigger. Player is not allowed to touch walls after passing it.
Activates target object physical properties on contact
Activates target object physical properties on contact
Activates target object physical properties on contact
Ski Jump game mode starting trigger. Place at the lip of the ramp.
Track waypoint. Allows creation of curved tracks.
Every game has a beginning - time to get the hang of the basics.
Fun for the whole family! But can you find the fastest route?
It goes up and up and up, but sooner or later, it'll come crashing down.
Technical jumping on tires and pipes.
Easy to finish, but which way is the fastest?
We're inside our heads. This is our dream.
There's a rock, and a drop behind it. Simple enough.
What goes down, must come up.
Try to remain on your bike inside the ball for as long as you can!
Smash yourself against obstacles to break your bones! For once, pain is good!
Make like an eagle and fly as far as you can! Don't forget to bail out!
High jump with a twist. Try to get as high as possible and don't forget to bail out!
Your bike is attached to a delivery cart, filled with explosives. See how far you get without blowing them up!
Once you are engulfed in flames, only speed can douse them. To slow down is to burn!
Flip it backwards or forwards. How many flips can you manage?
Balance yourself on top of the ball and see how far you get before gravity proves to be a harsh mistress.
Climb up, reach the skies. How high can you get?
Gotta collect 'em all! Smash the targets with your bike.
The bike's front wheel is loose! Ride with your front wheel up in the air as far as possible.
Try flying through as many rings of fire as you can.
Sometimes the solution is not quite that evident...
It's not a pipe dream if you can ride on the pipe.
Can you make it to the end? Speed is not the key.
Hope you're up for an uphill struggle!
Smooth humps for your driving pleasure.
Ah, sweet memories... This one takes skill.
Keep making those jumps, and you might pull this one off yet!
Hard to get up. Harder to come down. Such is life.
When the going gets tough, the tough get Old School.
Sorry, no beer case for the winner this time!
The faster you ride, the easier it gets. Jump!
Things might break, but don't let it distract you!
Don't rush it. Keep it steady.
You're as smooth as a... rock?
Lean forward. Most of the time. Probably.
Throttle, brake, leaning and checkpoints. That's about it.
Remember to lean and control the rider in the air. Fly like a bird! Just try not to land on your face.
In the real world, objects tend to move when you push them. Wonder if that works in a video game?
The class is in session for serious riders. This is where the real game begins.
Collect targets and bail out. Simple and fun!
A mid-day trip to the old playgrounds.
Dusk falls upon the familiar neighborhood. It's quiet and peaceful, so better rev that engine!
Going down can be a challenge of its own.
Very easy? Sure, but things will get hard soon enough.
Just ride it and be happy.
Wow! You're really getting good at this!
You got it! Oh baby, you got it!
Which way is the fastest? Your way, it seems!
Good to the last drop! Well driven!
Hail to the King, baby! Nice driving!
You went under but surfaced with your head held high! Nicely done!
Sticks and stones broke your bones!
Is that a bird? A plane? No! It's some crazy dude on a bike!
Then you got high! Really high, man! Dude!
Some of the best performances end with a bang. Or was that a whimper?
You are on top of your game!
I believe you can fly. I believe you can reach the skies!
There's no doubt about your riding skills!
Your screws are not loose at all!
You sure didn't just fly in circles!
Your driving is like an HDMI image in its beauty!
Sleep, dream, ride. You are it, man!
Even an orbital ion cannon wouldn't be able to hit you!
Up, up, and away! That. Was. Amazing!
And you dusted the world. Superb driving!
You are faster than your own shadow!
Empires may come and go, but your skill remains unparalleled!
Fabulous! You've come to terms with your inner greatness!
You know, it just might be an actual crime to ride that well.
Is there no limit to your skill?
Man, you don't slow down for anything, do you?
You ride like a pro. Excellent work!
Smooth and clean - you do it so well!
Did you notice where the stones come from?
What's got two legs and rides with pure perfection? You!
You are faster than a bird - faster than a robin!
Yeah, baby, yeah! You're going to Hollywood!
It's hard to even begin to describe your greatness!
You came, you saw, you blew it all up.
